reason_for_decision: Well-structured, operationally credible, and strong on turning telemetry into maintainable workflow design.
strengths: Moves beyond online-offline monitoring and gives a useful health model around freshness, quality, timing, and dependencies.
Separates technical symptoms from mission impact in a way that fits real multi-sensor operations.
Provides concrete workflow value through routing logic, recovery-state design, and meaningful health metrics.
summary_assessment: A reviewer-safe professional article with strong system-design framing, good operational specificity, and clear practical guidance for health monitoring workflows.
